entries.title: Most token launches break AFTER the raise 😵

Our White Label Launchpad brings stability to the entire flow. Book a demo → http://calendly.com/saaswl/demo https://www.chaingpt.org/blog

entries.title: Tether Says It Will Be Audited By Big Four Accounting Firm—But Won't Say Which One
entries.snippet: The first independent audit of Tether’s claimed $192 billion stablecoin reserves could pave the way to USDT’s approval under the GENIUS Act.
entries.tweet_text: Tether Says It Will Be Audited By Big Four Accounting Firm—But Won't Say Which One

entries.title: Silo V3 launches new liquidation mechanism opening door to new forms of crypto collateral
entries.snippet: Silo V3, unveiled Tuesday, adds a protocol-level insolvency protection mechanism to reduce the dependency on DEX liquidity.
entries.tweet_text: Silo V3 launches new liquidation mechanism opening door to new forms of crypto collateral

entries.title: CFTC forms new innovation task force to shape crypto, artificial intelligence and prediction markets
entries.snippet: The CFTC launched a new task force focused on cryptocurrencies, artificial intelligence, and the rapidly emerging area of prediction markets.
entries.tweet_text: CFTC forms new innovation task force to shape crypto, artificial intelligence and prediction markets

entries.title: .@Kodeus has integrated Allora inference as a core capability in their agent launch platform. Builders deploying agents on Kodeus access Allora's predictive ...
entries.snippet: Allora (@AlloraNetwork): .@Kodeus has integrated Allora inference as a core capability in their agent launch platform. Builders deploying agents on Kodeus access Allora's predictive price feeds natively at the point of deployment. No separate data infrastructure required.

entries.title: Agentic payments gave agents a reason to exist
entries.snippet: Cookie DAO 🍪 (@cookiedotfun): Agentic payments gave agents a reason to exist a single narrative hit critical mass in ~48 hours: Agentic payments → @stripe + Tempo launched the Machine Payments Protocol. → World dropped AgentKit. → WorldLibertyFi pushed AgentPay. → Brian Armstrong started asking when
